summary: Excellent matrix recording of a perpetually awesome show
review: Reviewers rave about this performance as "perpetually awesome" and note that the recording has been elegantly treated, suggesting a clear and well‑balanced sound. The single five‑star review indicates strong musical enjoyment despite lacking specific song commentary.

ai_rating.rationale: High praise for both performance and recording quality, but only one brief review limits certainty

recording_quality.technical_notes: Elegant treatment noted; clean, balanced sound with no reported issues

show_quality.setlist_flow: Generally praised as an outstanding performance throughout
